# Altium FileHeader records (reviewable sibling -- NOT parsed at runtime).
# Index is the POST-HEADER position: the reader drops record 'H' (HEADER),
# so OwnerIndex N refers to the record printed with index N below.
 H : |HEADER=Protel for Windows - Schematic Capture Binary File Version 5.0| (auto-prepended)
 0 : RECORD=1 Location.X=900 Location.Y=1000 LibReference=DEVICE
 1 : RECORD=34 OwnerIndex=0 Text=U1
 2 : RECORD=2 OwnerIndex=0 Designator=1 Name=A Location.X=1010 Location.Y=1000 PinLength=10 PinConglomerate=2 Electrical=4 OwnerPartId=1
 3 : RECORD=2 OwnerIndex=0 Designator=2 Name=NC Location.X=1000 Location.Y=1510 PinLength=10 PinConglomerate=3 Electrical=4 OwnerPartId=1
 4 : RECORD=1 Location.X=2100 Location.Y=1000 LibReference=DEVICE
 5 : RECORD=34 OwnerIndex=4 Text=U2
 6 : RECORD=2 OwnerIndex=4 Designator=1 Name=B Location.X=2010 Location.Y=1000 PinLength=10 PinConglomerate=2 Electrical=4 OwnerPartId=1
 7 : RECORD=27 LocationCount=2 X1=1000 Y1=1000 X2=2000 Y2=1000
 8 : RECORD=22 Location.X=1000 Location.Y=1500
